name: orders_db
description: Query the ORDERS database (customers, products, order status, totals, revenue). Read-only.

name: hr_db
description: Query the HR / EMPLOYEES database (people, roles, departments, salaries). Read-only.

name: analytics_db
description: Query the ANALYTICS database on Postgres (signups, events, plans, purchases). Read-only.

name: active_orders
description: How many orders are currently active
query: SELECT COUNT(*) AS active_orders FROM orders WHERE status='active'

name: server_uptime
description: Show how long this server has been up

name: self_health
description: Check the controller's own /health endpoint is up
